name: Jean
title: Dandelion Knight
description: The righteous and rigorous Dandelion Knight, and Acting Grand Master of Mondstadt's Knights of Favonius.

constellations.name: Spiraling Tempest
description: Increases the pulling speed of **Gale Blade** after holding for more than 1s, and increases the DMG dealt by 40%.

constellations.name: People's Aegis
description: When Jean picks up an Elemental Orb/Particle, all party members have their Movement SPD and ATK SPD increased by 15% for 15s.

constellations.name: When the West Wind Arises
description: Increases the Level of **Dandelion Breeze** by 3.

constellations.name: Lands of Dandelion
description: Within the Field created by **Dandelion Breeze**, all opponents have their **Anemo RES** decreased by 40%.

constellations.name: Outbursting Gust
description: Increases the Level of **Gale Blade** by 3.

constellations.name: Lion's Fang, Fair Protector of Mondstadt
description: Incoming DMG is decreased by 35% within the Field created by **Dandelion Breeze**. Upon leaving the Dandelion Field, this effect lasts for 3 attacks or 10s.

charged: Consumes a certain amount of stamina to launch an opponent using the power of wind.
Launched opponents will slowly fall to the ground.
plunge: Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.

elemental_skill.name: Gale Blade
description: Focusing the might of the formless wind around her blade, Jean releases a miniature storm, launching opponents in the direction she aims at, dealing massive **Anemo DMG**.

sections.title: Hold
text: At the cost of continued stamina consumption, Jean can command the whirlwind to pull surrounding opponents and objects towards her front.
Character is immobile during skill duration.

elemental_burst.name: Dandelion Breeze
description: Calling upon the wind's protection, Jean creates a swirling Dandelion Field, launching surrounding opponents and dealing **Anemo DMG**.
At the same time, she instantly regenerates a large amount of HP for all party members. The amount of HP restored scales off Jean's ATK.

sections.title: Dandelion Field
text: ▸ Continuously regenerates HP of characters within the AoE and continuously imbues them with **Anemo**.
▸ Deals **Anemo DMG** to opponents entering or exiting the Dandelion Field.

passives.name: Wind Companion
description: On hit, Jean's Normal Attacks have a 50% chance to regenerate HP equal to 15% of Jean's ATK for all party members.

passives.name: Let the Wind Lead
description: Using **Dandelion Breeze** will regenerate 20% of its Energy.

passives.name: Guiding Breeze
description: When a Perfect Cooking is achieved on a dish with restorative effects, there is a 12% chance to obtain double the product.
